name: app
description: This is a demo MERN application that exposes condo management reports through a role-based web portal. It implements:

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server
scripts.install:all: npm i && npm --prefix server i && npm --prefix client i && npm --prefix launcher i
scripts.desktop:bundle:win: npm run launcher:package:win && npm run desktop:release:win
scripts.desktop:bundle:mac: npm run launcher:package:mac && npm run desktop:release:mac
scripts.desktop:bundle:mac:x64: npm run launcher:package:mac:x64 && npm run desktop:release:mac:x64
scripts.desktop:bundle:mac:arm64: npm run launcher:package:mac:arm64 && npm run desktop:release:mac:arm64
scripts.desktop:bundle:linux: npm run launcher:package:linux && npm run desktop:release:linux
scripts.desktop:bundle:runtime:win: npm run launcher:package:win && npm run desktop:release:runtime:win
scripts.desktop:bundle:runtime:mac: npm run launcher:package:mac && npm run desktop:release:runtime:mac
scripts.desktop:bundle:runtime:mac:x64: npm run launcher:package:mac:x64 && npm run desktop:release:runtime:mac:x64
scripts.desktop:bundle:runtime:mac:arm64: npm run launcher:package:mac:arm64 && npm run desktop:release:runtime:mac:arm64
scripts.desktop:bundle:runtime:linux: npm run launcher:package:linux && npm run desktop:release:runtime:linux
